Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Denner]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Denner is a rough-looking man and an old friend of Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Denner advised Simon regarding the trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — Denner has a talking book named Hariman.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Denner is a man with a giant book who allowed people out of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Denner is someone Kai intends to alert.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Denner is one of Valin's true children who passed his test.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Denner told Simon that Kai lacks the Nye essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Denner is a person who carries a Dragon's Fang and a huge red-and-gold book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Denner is present in the scene and smiles at Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — Denner is tasked with protecting the Asphodel Incarnation with Eli.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Denner is a figure in a brown cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Denner carries a red-wrapped sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Denner was once the master of Valin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Denner uses Dragon's Fang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Denner is a Traveler behind the King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Denner tried to convince Benson to give him steel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Denner patted Simon on the back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Denner is a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Denner responded to Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Denner left a note for Simon.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Denner is someone Valin failed to teach to stop jumping around.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Denner is a Valinhall Traveler who stays in the House for a day or two at a time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Denner is a person the Eldest considered for the Nye essence instead of Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Denner takes every chance he can get to leave the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Indirial has not heard from Denner in weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Denner has had his Dragon's Fang removed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Denner can summon a spear from the armory.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
